## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Circuit to explore potential collaboration on AI-driven content creation and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Circuit, a year-old startup, specializes in AI solutions for manufacturing and industrial sectors, focusing on technical support and distribution management.](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation services, with a two-phase approach: initial sprint for strategy and artifact creation, followed by growth execution.](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Circuit is interested in expanding their content strategy to target SMB/mid-market segments and establish thought leadership in their space.](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Monday at 11 AM CST to discuss GrowthX's platform and potential collaboration in more detail.](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Offerings

  - [Founded over a year ago, now at 70 employees and $7+ million run rate](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Focuses on AI-driven content creation to help companies build inbound engines](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: Initial sprint for strategy/artifact creation, followed by growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Typical engagement includes 5-15 articles per week, with some custom options available](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows to generate content quickly after establishing proper foundation](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Circuit's Business Model and Challenges

  - [Founded by ex-semiconductor industry executives](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Specializes in AI solutions for manufacturing and industrial sectors](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Key product: AI-powered system for technical support and distribution management](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Current clients include Culligan Water; conversations with Yamaha, Baseline](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Challenge: Long sales cycles (54-87 weeks) with large buying teams (18-24 people)](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Circuit's Growth Strategy and Content Needs

  - [Successfully securing enterprise-level meetings, but looking to expand into SMB/mid-market](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Need for educational content to explain their unique value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Interested in building brand and thought leadership in their space](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Exploring mix of outbound and content strategies for near-term growth](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Creating content that serves dual purposes: inbound marketing and sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Developing educational materials for SMB/mid-market segments](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Establishing thought leadership in AI for manufacturing/industrial sectors](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Possibly exploring custom content options (e.g., video production, podcast appearances)](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday at 11 AM CST](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Kyle to prepare platform demo and relevant customer examples](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Kyle to brainstorm collaboration ideas based on Circuit's context](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Circuit team to consider specific questions or areas of interest for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/KZpZ_HxTo_kN_ixUUHBBwZ9w1c8kg3ba?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
